title: Senior Software Engineer - Aptech - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Aptech - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aptech. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Software Engineer to strengthen our Kolkata-based team.

About Aptech:
Aptech is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aptech!
